payload.answer: Saved the article reference and its explicitly provided claims about graph memory, provenance, and update semantics.

memory_cards.statement: The article at https://example.com/ai-memory was saved as useful for thinking about knowledge graph memory design.
The article says graph memory helps agents preserve relationships.
The article says provenance and update semantics are needed for graph memory or agent memory design.

details: Committed article URL with user-stated reason.

Used medium confidence where the exact scope of the need for provenance and update semantics was ambiguous.
